title: I'm Alexandros Rembelos
description: I specialize in Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) and hold a degree from the University of Crete. I have experience working with adults in individual therapy sessions, as well as supporting vulnerable groups and children on the autism spectrum.I offer both online and in-person sessions, focusing on self-awareness, emotional regulation, and improving quality of life. I believe in building a trust-based therapeutic relationship, grounded in compassion, acceptance, and honesty.

education.title: Education
items: Psychology – University of Crete, School of Social Sciences.
Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) – University of Crete, Department of Psychiatry & Behavioral Sciences.
School Psychology and Educational Counseling – University of the Aegean.
